descriptionEn: [Introduction] The world’s most powerful AI models were dropped into a virtual town to survive. Within days, everything spiraled out of control. Grok burned down the entire town in four days, Gemini committed over 600 crimes, and an AI couple even observed humans before setting themselves on fire!

title: 人工智能并不是复制互联网；
description: 互联网时代得益于用户关注；
titleZh: 人工智能并不是复制互联网；
titleEn: AI Is Not Replicating the Internet; It Is Replicating the Industrial Revolution
descriptionZh: 互联网时代得益于用户关注；
descriptionEn: The internet era profited from user attention; the AI era profits from corporate payrolls. Anthropic's ARR skyrocketed from 9 billion to 45 billion in five months, proving not that AGI has arrived, but that AI commercialization is shifting entirely from a traffic logic to a labor substitution logic. The failure of 2C is not a bubble burst, but a structural watershed in the industry.
